get.description: Returns the active, non-deleted subordinate hierarchy below a user. Admin, HR Manager, and Auditor can inspect any active root; other actors can inspect only self or a root inside their own hierarchy path. The response is backed by the ltree-style hierarchy path and includes relative depth and summary counts.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Optional sort key supported by the endpoint.

depth.description: Relative hierarchy depth below the requested root. Direct reports are depth 1.

total_active_descendants.description: Total active, non-deleted descendants under the requested root.

max_depth.description: Deepest relative level returned in the full active subtree.

tags.name: Platform / Health
tags.description: Liveness, readiness, and OpenAPI contract endpoints.

tags.name: Auth & Sessions
tags.description: Login, logout, and current session context.

tags.name: Core / Employees & Hierarchy
tags.description: Core employee identity and ltree hierarchy lookup.

tags.name: Expenses / Requester
tags.description: Requester-owned expense creation and read flows.

tags.name: Expenses / Manager
tags.description: Manager verification queue, document checks, and decision workflow.

tags.name: Finance Management
tags.description: Finance queue, approval, payment, settlement, analytics, audit, and finance reports.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Secure document metadata, object-storage-backed file access, verification, and access logs.

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Asset inventory, QR scan, assignment, recovery, and license workflows.

tags.name: Timesheets
tags.description: Work segments, submissions, approval queues, and workflow definitions.

tags.name: Reports & Analytics
tags.description: Role-scoped expense registers and export readiness.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Notification contracts are emitted by backend workflows; no public endpoint is exposed in this delivery.

tags.name: Outbox / Platform Events
tags.description: Transactional outbox and protected local event consumer contracts.
